'''Maxa Jandovar''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[vandfill]]ist who performed during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Jandovar was a famous [[Musician/Legends|musician]] whose song "[[Does Anyone Weep?]]" reached the fifth rank in the top selling [[sound slug]]s in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. However, during the days of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], artists like Jandover who opposed it found themselves persecuted. Although not actively hunted, if their whereabouts were known they would certainly be arrested. Jandovar traveled constantly, and over the last five years of her career was closely followed by [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] fugitive [[Kardue'sai'Malloc/Legends|Kardue'sai'Malloc]], a great lover of music. The Devaronian kept missing her due to her frantic schedule, but continued to try. He missed her on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], and then heard that she would be on [[Morvogodine]].

Unluckily for both, Jandovar was arrested by the Galactic Empire while on Morvogodine, and died in Imperial custody. Kardue'sai'Malloc was crushed, but following the death of the musician he may well have been, as he proclaimed to [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], the sole owner of the last surviving recordings of the legendary star.
